name: Course Launch Blueprint
description: A complete course launch campaign from pre-launch buzz to cart close — built for solopreneurs

automation.action: Send launch email 1 + post across all social channels
automation.followUp: Monitor sales and send urgency email when 50% through launch window

automation.action: Send post-launch thank you + waitlist invite
automation.followUp: Send debrief survey to buyers after 7 days

assets.title: Pre-Launch Email 1: The Problem Post
assets.content:
Subject: The real reason [desired outcome] feels so hard

Hey [First Name],

I want to talk about something most people in [your niche] won't say out loud.

[THE HONEST TRUTH ABOUT THE PROBLEM — 2–3 paragraphs that validate their struggle without talking about your course yet]

Example framework:
"If you've been trying to [desired outcome] and it hasn't clicked yet — it's not because you're doing it wrong. It's because [the REAL root cause that most advice misses]."

"I know this because [personal story or client observation — 1–2 sentences]."

"The problem isn't [what they think it is]. It's [the reframe that makes your course make sense]."

Tomorrow I'm going to share something I've never talked about publicly — the [specific insight/system/approach] that changed everything for me and the [X] clients I've walked through it.

Keep an eye on your inbox.

[Your Name]

P.S. Hit reply and tell me: what's the #1 thing that's kept you from [desired outcome] so far? Your answer will actually shape what I share this week.

assets.title: Pre-Launch Email 3: The Framework Reveal
assets.content:
Subject: The [NAME] framework — here's how it works

Hey [First Name],

A few days ago I asked what's kept you from [desired outcome].

The replies were incredible — and what I noticed is that almost everyone was dealing with [COMMON THEME FROM REPLIES / what you anticipated].

So today I want to show you the framework I use to solve exactly that.

I call it [YOUR FRAMEWORK NAME / METHOD].

Here's how it works:

[PHASE 1 NAME]: [1–2 sentence explanation]
↓
[PHASE 2 NAME]: [1–2 sentence explanation]
↓
[PHASE 3 NAME]: [1–2 sentence explanation]
↓
[PHASE 4 NAME]: [1–2 sentence explanation — the result]

Most people try to skip straight to [Phase 4] without doing [Phase 1–3]. That's why they stay stuck.

When you follow the full sequence, here's what happens:
• [Result 1]
• [Result 2]
• [Result 3]

[CLIENT NAME] used this to [specific result] in [timeframe]. [Brief story.]

I'm going to walk you through every step of this system in my new program, [COURSE NAME].

I'll share the details in a few days — but I wanted to give you the framework first so you can start seeing results immediately.

More soon.

[Your Name]

assets.title: Launch Day Email: Cart Open
assets.content:
Subject: It's open — [COURSE NAME] is live

Hey [First Name],

The moment I've been building toward all week:

[COURSE NAME] is officially open for enrollment.

[COURSE NAME] is [what it is] for [your audience] who want [desired outcome] without [pain they want to avoid].

Inside, you'll get:
✅ [Module/Feature 1] — [benefit]
✅ [Module/Feature 2] — [benefit]
✅ [Module/Feature 3] — [benefit]
✅ [Bonus 1] — [value and benefit]
✅ [Bonus 2 if applicable]

Here's what [STUDENT NAME] said after completing it:
"[SPECIFIC TESTIMONIAL]"
— [Name, role, location]

Enrollment is open until [DATE] at [TIME] [TIMEZONE].
After that, [what happens — price goes up / doors close].

Join [COURSE NAME] here:
[SALES PAGE LINK]

Any questions — hit reply. I'm here all week.

[Your Name]

P.S. The [SPECIFIC BONUS] is only available during this launch window. After [DATE], it goes away.

assets.title: Launch Week — Objection Crusher Email
assets.content:
Subject: "Is this right for me if I'm [common hesitation]?"

Hey [First Name],

I've been getting a lot of questions this week — which tells me there are people on the fence who haven't found the right information yet.

Let me answer the most common ones:

---
"I'm a complete beginner — will this work for me?"
[HONEST ANSWER — don't overpromise, but reassure if appropriate]

---
"I've bought courses before and not finished them."
[ADDRESS — what makes yours different structurally, or what accountability you offer]

---
"I don't have a lot of time."
[ANSWER — how much time is needed, how it's structured for busy people]

---
"What if it doesn't work for my specific situation?"
[ANSWER — your guarantee, your support, examples of different situations you've helped]

---
Still have a question not covered here? Hit reply right now — I'll answer you personally before enrollment closes on [DATE].

Ready to join?
[SALES PAGE LINK]

[Your Name]

assets.title: Cart Close Sequence — Final Day
assets.content:
Subject: Closing in [X] hours

Hey [First Name],

[COURSE NAME] closes tonight at [TIME] [TIMEZONE].

If you've been thinking about it — this is your moment.

Here's the honest truth:

Everything you need to [achieve the desired outcome] is inside this program. The [specific module or feature] alone has helped [clients] get [specific result].

After tonight:
• The price goes up to $[new price] [or] enrollment closes
• [Bonus] will no longer be included
• The next time I open this will be [timeframe if known]

This is not manufactured urgency. [Cart close reason — why it's actually closing: cohort starts, price increases, you're limiting enrollment, etc.]

If you're in — here's the link:
[SALES PAGE LINK — make it prominent]

If you have a last-minute question, reply to this email right now. I'm watching my inbox.

[Your Name]

P.S. If you decide not to join this round — no hard feelings. Hit reply and I'll add you to the waitlist for the next opening.

assets.title: Launch Social Posts (3 Templates)
assets.content:
SOCIAL POST 1 — PRE-LAUNCH BUZZ (1 week before)

🚨 Something I've been working on for [timeframe] is almost ready.

I'll be sharing [COURSE NAME] with you [next week / on DATE].

It's a [describe in one line] for [your audience] who want [desired outcome].

If you want to be the first to know when it opens — [follow me / drop a 🙋 in the comments / click the link in bio to join the early access list].

More details coming soon.

---
SOCIAL POST 2 — LAUNCH DAY

🎉 It's here.

[COURSE NAME] is officially open.

This is for you if:
→ You're a [audience type]
→ You want [desired outcome]
→ You're ready to [commitment]

Enrollment closes [DATE]. Link in bio.

[1–2 sentence genuine statement about why you built this]

---
SOCIAL POST 3 — SOCIAL PROOF (mid-launch)

[STUDENT NAME] joined [COURSE NAME] [X] days ago.

Here's what [he/she/they] said:

"[DIRECT QUOTE — specific result or transformation]"

That's why I built this.

Enrollment closes [DATE].
[Link or 'link in bio']

assets.title: Webinar Invite Email
assets.content:
Subject: Free training: [WEBINAR TITLE] — [DATE]

Hey [First Name],

I'm hosting a free [live training / workshop / masterclass] and I want you to be there.

📅 [WEBINAR NAME]
🗓 [DATE] at [TIME] [TIMEZONE]
🔗 Register here: [LINK]

In this [60/90]-minute session, I'm going to show you:
→ [What they'll learn — specific and valuable]
→ [Second key takeaway]
→ [Third key takeaway]

This is NOT a sales pitch disguised as a training. I'm going to give you [specific deliverable — a framework, a template, a live audit] that you can use immediately.

[At the end, I will share details about [COURSE NAME] — but only after I've given you [the value promise] first.]

Spots are limited to [number] (I want to be able to take questions).

→ Reserve your spot here: [LINK]

See you there,
[Your Name]

P.S. If you can't make it live — register anyway. I'll send the replay to everyone who signed up, but only for [24/48] hours.
